publishedAbstract: * After pod deletion the `noobaa-db-pg-cluster-x` pod enters a state of `0/1` Running * `noobaa-db-pg-cluster-x` logs are firing multiple iterations of `"pg_rewind","msg"` * `openshift-storage` events are firing `"Readiness probe error: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 500"` * Pod "noobaa-db-pg-cluster-x" logs show repeated errors: "could not receive data from WAL stream" and "waiting for WAL to become available" * `"pg_rewind","msg":"pg_rewind: servers diverged at WAL location xxxx on timeline` * `"pg_rewind","msg":"pg_rewind: error: could not restore file "xxxx" from archive"` * `"pg_rewind","msg":"pg_rewind: error: could not find previous WAL record` * `"FATAL","sql_state_code":" ","message":"the database system is not yet accepting connections","detail":"Consistent recovery state has not been yet reached."`
publishedTitle: Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG)/NooBaa High Availability (HA) PostgreSQL Database Impacted "pg_rewind","msg" - "Readiness probe error: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 500" - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.19+
